title: Edit this homepage without touching the app code
description: This demo page reads a JSON file managed by Pages CMS. Change the text, swap the image, save in the CMS, and the site updates from the committed content. Noob
imageAlt: Abstract illustration showing a CMS editing panel sending content into a rendered website
productsTitle: A sortable product carousel driven by the CMS
productsDescription: Reorder these products in Pages CMS to change the carousel sequence without editing the component. Each card reads straight from the homepage content file.

products.name: Dune Carryall
products.description: Soft canvas weekender with vegetable-tanned straps and a structured base for quick overnight packing.

products.name: Cinder Bottle
products.description: Insulated steel bottle with a powder-coated finish, hidden loop cap, and all-day temperature control.

products.name: Mesa Lamp
products.description: Compact table lamp with a warm linen shade and dimmable glow built for desks, shelves, and reading nooks.

products.name: Harbor Journal
products.description: Thread-bound notebook with recycled paper, lay-flat stitching, and a durable cover that wears in over time.

products.name: Slate Speaker
products.description: Portable bluetooth speaker wrapped in woven fabric with balanced sound for kitchens, patios, and desks.
